name: Cinnamon Raisin Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat your oven and mix all the ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Pour the mixture into a bread pan.
3. Select white bread on your machine settings.
4. Press start to begin baking.
5. You can add raisins either at the beginning of mixing (to ensure even distribution) or when the machine beeps during the second mixing stage (to keep them whole).
